integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Nuxeo UI, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the document edit forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard Nuxeo edit screens, dropdown menus being opened, and 'Save' buttons being clicked, rather than using browser developer tools to alter the text visually.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows are not the primary means of executing the task; no curl commands or python scripts interacting with the Nuxeo API are visible.
